title: Carrack
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the Human|[[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]]}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Carrack |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height=2 meters + |mass= |hair=Fair |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Fair |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I take it you're the valet.''"
"''The Witches respect shows of strength. Mostly, I blow stuff up.|Han Solo and Carrack|''[[Fate of the Jedi: Backlash]]''}} '''Carrack''' was a large [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] in the aftermath of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Solo]] traveled into Dathomir's wilderness to find [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Ben Skywalker]], Carrack was hired as one of their guides. They found the Skywalkers and joined them in attending the [[Conclave of the Raining Leaves Clan and the Broken Columns Clan|conclave]] of the [[Raining Leaves Clan|Raining Leaves]] and [[Broken Columns Clan]]s. However, the conclave was sabotaged by multiple [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] attacks, and Carrack was severely injured during one such attack. He was forced to return to the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] for medical treatment. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Fate of the Jedi: Backlash]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Backlash (audiobook)}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Carrack#legends }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
